WELCOME TO THE HOME OF

A DATASET FARMERS MARKET

We source fresh, small batch datasets, offering these for sale at our in-person market events! Curated and organized by Claire Hentschker

Artisanal & heirloom • Hand-picked text & image training sets • Ethically & unethically(jk?) sourced collections • Locally grown • One-of-a-kind • Limited edition • Rare & unique

Image files • Text files • Zipped files LoRAs • SD cards • Thumb drives • Prints Air-drops • One-of-one transfers

PAST EVENTS:

  • 2025-04-27: Rhizome World at WSA, 161 Water Street, 5th & 6th floors Event Link
  • 2024-12-15:LARPA, Bushwick, NY. Event Link.

PRESS:

  • PCMag: No Banana Bread Here—This Farmers Market Traffics in Data
  • WBGO Journal: Everything at this Farmers Market Could Be Cooked but None of It Was Edible
  • Inside 'Small Batch,' a farmers market for datasets

We are currently planning future Small Batch Data Fairs. Please email clairehentschker@gmail.com if your organization is interested in hosting this event!
